parameters.text:
=Extract the recruiter contact from the email signature. Return ONLY a JSON array in exactly this format:
[{"fullName": "Max Mustermann", "mobilePhone": "+491701234567", "landlinePhone": "+49301234567", "email": "max@example.com"}]

Rules:
- fullName: full name of the sender (NOT Atanas Alexandrov)
- mobilePhone: mobile number, empty string if none
- landlinePhone: office or landline number, empty string if none. Do NOT use Fax numbers.
- email: must contain @, no website URLs, empty string if none
- Return [] if no valid person contact with phone number found

Email:
{{ $json.textPlain }}

parameters.jsCode:
const decodedText = Buffer.from($input.first().json.content, 'base64').toString('utf8');

return [{ json: { existingContent: decodedText } }];

parameters.commitMessage: Add new contacts from email via n8n
